name: Grecian Skillet Rib Eyes
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon chopped kalamata or ripe olives
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a bowl.
2. Rub the mixture onto all sides of the steaks.
3. Pour the olive oil into a large nonstick skillet and place over medium heat until hot.
4. Add the steaks to the skillet and cook for 10 to 14 minutes, or to your desired level of doneness, turning once.
5. Sprinkle with lemon juice; top with cheese and olives. Yield: 2 to 4 servings.
